title: Manage organic livestock production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage organic livestock production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to manage animal health and welfare

pcs.text: Investigate and consider natural behaviours, requirements and welfare of animals when planning for organic livestock production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and consider natural behaviours, requirements and welfare of animals when planning for organic livestock production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and consider natural behaviours, requirements and welfare of animals when planning for organic livestock production.

pcs.text: Identify production requirements and environment of farm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify production requirements and environment of farm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify production requirements and environment of farm.

pcs.text: Identify and select genetic varieties of animals best suited to production requirements and environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select genetic varieties of animals best suited to production requirements and environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select genetic varieties of animals best suited to production requirements and environment.

pcs.text: Develop animal health management strategies for farm
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop animal health management strategies for farm?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop animal health management strategies for farm.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to manage animal health and welfare

elements.title: Manage animal health and welfare

pcs.text: Communicate and implement animal health management strategy to work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate and implement animal health management strategy to work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate and implement animal health management strategy to work team.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock for health and welfare
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock for health and welfare?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock for health and welfare.

pcs.text: Manage livestock according to certified organic standards and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage livestock according to certified organic standards and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage livestock according to certified organic standards and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct animal husbandry and transport according to animal welfare principles and organic certification requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct animal husbandry and transport according to animal welfare principles and organic certification requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct animal husbandry and transport according to animal welfare principles and organic certification requirements.

pcs.text: Maintain livestock records required for organic certification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain livestock records required for organic certification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain livestock records required for organic certification.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage animal health and welfare

elements.title: Develop and implement supplementary feed requirements

pcs.text: Identify feed gaps and requirements for supplementary feed, taking into account seasonal conditions and drought
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify feed gaps and requirements for supplementary feed, taking into account seasonal conditions and drought?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify feed gaps and requirements for supplementary feed, taking into account seasonal conditions and drought.

pcs.text: Incorporate on-farm supplementary feed strategies, including fodder crops, agroforestry or standing hay paddocks, into the annual program for animal feed and on-farm sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate on-farm supplementary feed strategies, including fodder crops, agroforestry or standing hay paddocks, into the annual program for animal feed and on-farm sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate on-farm supplementary feed strategies, including fodder crops, agroforestry or standing hay paddocks, into the annual program for animal feed and on-farm sustainability.

pcs.text: Implement good storage practices for feed inputs to ensure quality is maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement good storage practices for feed inputs to ensure quality is maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement good storage practices for feed inputs to ensure quality is maintained.

pcs.text: Purchase and use nutritional inputs in the feed program that meet relevant Organic Standards and/or agroecological principles where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Purchase and use nutritional inputs in the feed program that meet relevant Organic Standards and/or agroecological principles where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Purchase and use nutritional inputs in the feed program that meet relevant Organic Standards and/or agroecological principles where applicable.

elements.title: Develop a sustainable grazing strategy

pcs.text: Determine feed requirements, carrying capacity and stocking rate for farm according to seasonal variability, livestock needs and sustainability requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine feed requirements, carrying capacity and stocking rate for farm according to seasonal variability, livestock needs and sustainability requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine indicators and benchmarks for sustainable pasture, land and soil use for farm.

pcs.text: Identify grazing infrastructure required according to planned grazing outcomes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify grazing infrastructure required according to planned grazing outcomes.

pcs.text: Incorporate infrastructure requirements into farm improvement program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate infrastructure requirements into farm improvement program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor grazing system to ensure productivity and sustainability.

pcs.text: Implement strategies for controlling weeds in pastures according to Organic Standards and agroecological principles

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement strategies for controlling weeds in pastures according to Organic Standards and agroecological principles.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of grazing activity according to workplace procedures and Organic Standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of grazing activity according to workplace procedures and Organic Standards.
